suggestions.title: Ensure integration test validates invocation-specific blob freshness
suggestions.action: Added pre/post blob snapshot checks (etag/last_modified) and deterministic pre-invoke cleanup option for staging workflow runs.

suggestions.title: Guarantee cleanup even if assertions fail
suggestions.action: Wrapped integration assertions in try/finally and performed guarded cleanup for created blobs.

suggestions.title: Workflow YAML indentation correctness
suggestions.action: Fixed env block indentation and added required integration test environment variables.

suggestions.title: Bound Azure CLI execution and provide actionable failures
suggestions.action: Added subprocess timeout and explicit handling for timeout, command failure, and missing az CLI.

suggestions.title: Case-sensitive production slot safety guard
suggestions.action: Normalized AZURE_FUNCTIONAPP_SLOT to lowercase before applying destructive-cleanup safety checks.

suggestions.title: Known-player exact-name assertions may be brittle against LLM variance
suggestions.action: Kept exact assertions because QA-02 acceptance criteria explicitly require Don Mattingly, Dave Winfield, and Rickey Henderson by name.
